typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		EMPLID as string,
		EMPLID_INT as string,
		NAME as string,
		NAME_LNFN as string,
		LAST_NAME as string,
		FIRST_NAME as string,
		EMAIL_ID as string,
		ELID as string,
		MANAGER_FLG as string,
		RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID as string,
		RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'parquet') ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource derive(Import_date = currentTimestamp(),
		EMPLOYEEID_INT = toLong(EMPLID_INT),
		EID = toString(EMPLID),
		NM = toString(NAME)) ~> ImportDate
ImportDate derive(Copy_of_NAME = toString(NAME),
		Copy_of_RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID = toString(RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID),
		Copy_of_RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL = toString(RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL),
		Copy_of_EMPLOYEEID_INT = EMPLOYEEID_INT,
		Copy_of_NAME_LNFN = toString(NAME_LNFN),
		Copy_of_ELID = toString(ELID),
		Copy_of_FIRST_NAME = toString(FIRST_NAME),
		Copy_of_EMAIL_ID = toString(EMAIL_ID),
		Copy_of_LAST_NAME = toString(LAST_NAME),
		Copy_of_MANAGER_FLG = toString(MANAGER_FLG),
		Copy_of_EMPLID = toString(EMPLID)) ~> DataConversion
DataConversion sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'parquet',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		EMPLID,
		EMPLID_INT,
		NAME,
		NAME_LNFN,
		LAST_NAME,
		FIRST_NAME,
		EMAIL_ID,
		ELID,
		MANAGER_FLG,
		RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID,
		RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL,
		EMPLOYEEID_INT,
		EID,
		NM,
		Import_date,
		Copy_of_EMPLID,
		Copy_of_NAME,
		Copy_of_NAME_LNFN,
		Copy_of_LAST_NAME,
		Copy_of_FIRST_NAME,
		Copy_of_EMAIL_ID,
		Copy_of_ELID,
		Copy_of_MANAGER_FLG,
		Copy_of_RPTS_TO_MGR_EMPLID,
		Copy_of_RPTS_TO_MGR_EMAIL,
		Copy_of_EMPLOYEEID_INT
	)) ~> FlatFileDestination
